title: University of Southampton Delhi Campus Tour Event Details
text: Campus tour 4 November Event Status: Completed Date & Time: November 04, 2025 3:00 PM IST Location: International Tech Park Gurgaon, Near Sec 59, Off, Golf Course Ext Rd, Gurugram, Haryana 122101, India Book now Campus tour Join us for an exciting in-person event at University of Southampton Delhi where you can explore our state-of-the-art facilities and get a feel for campus life. This is your chance to experience first-hand what it’s like to be a part of our vibrant community. Don’t miss out on this opportunity to discover all that the University of Southampton has to offer. International Tech Park Gurgaon, Near Sec 59, Off, Golf Course Ext Rd, Gurugram, Haryana 122101, India Open address in Google Maps
summary: Information regarding the completed campus tour event held on November 4, 2025, at the International Tech Park Gurgaon, offering visitors a chance to explore facilities and campus life.
